content: Phase 2: Install @supabase/supabase-js and add env vars
Phase 2: Generate SQL migration file (schema.sql) with 14 tables + RLS policies
Phase 2: Configure Google Fonts and Tailwind design tokens
Phase 2: Build Welcome, Login, Register screens
Phase 2: Build placeholder screens (Home + 5 tabs + Settings)
Phase 2: Configure React Router and verify routes
Phase 3: End-to-end testing with testing_agent_v3 against 10 user stories (100% pass)
Phase 2: Apply SQL schema (USER ACTION REQUIRED: paste /app/frontend/src/sql/schema.sql in Supabase SQL Editor)
